name: Mitch
bio: Mitch leads technical delivery and website architecture for Alphabyte AI. He is responsible for the build, deployment, and ongoing development of the Alphabyte AI platform — from static site infrastructure on Cloudflare Pages to the component library and design system that powers every page.

With deep experience across modern web stacks, Mitch owns the end-to-end pipeline: Next.js architecture, Tailwind design tokens, CI/CD, and production monitoring. He works directly with the founding team to translate design direction into shipped product.

credentials.keyCoursework: Web Systems · Software Architecture · Database Design · Cloud Computing · DevOps

achievements: Architected and shipped the Alphabyte AI marketing platform end-to-end
Built a component library and design token system from the brand guide
Established the static export pipeline for Cloudflare Pages

footerBio.name: Alphabyte AI
footerBio.description: The Claude-focused practice of Alphabyte Solutions. Mid-market AI from the ground up — citizen development, executive enablement, MCP integration, and autonomous agents.
